name: Satya Nadella
bio: Indian-American tech executive who became Microsoft's CEO in 2014. Under his leadership, Microsoft completed its cloud transformation and became the largest infrastructure investor in the AI era. Led the strategic investment in OpenAI and the buildout of the Azure AI platform.

quotes.text: AI is not a cost center — it's a revenue multiplier. Every dollar of AI spend is generating three times the cloud revenue growth.
We're not building AI products — we're making every Microsoft product an AI product. This is a platform shift, not a feature addition.
